data.title: Chinese AI stars MiniMax and Zhipu plan Hong Kong IPOs, setting up big 2026
data.description:
MiniMax and Zhipu, two Chinese AI startups, are preparing to go public in early 2026 on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange. MiniMax and Zhipu, two AI startups backed by Alibaba and Tencent, have announced plans to complete Hong Kong IPOs by 2026 after getting approval from the China Securities Regulatory Commission (CSRC) MiniMax and Zhipu […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/minimax-zhipu-plan-hong-kong-ipo/

data.title: Microsoft challenges a $2.8 billion lawsuit in UK over cloud computing licenses
data.description:

The claim, worth £2. 1 billion, is now before the Competition Appeal Tribunal, which has been asked to certify the case so […]
